releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## New Feature
- Now it is possible to manually add weight to any file

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/CalfMoon/node-factor/compare/2.1.0...3.0.0
releases.name: v3.0.0

releases.author: CalfMoon
releases.description:
## What's Changed

* Optimize: Remove unnecessary looping
* Remove hash map used for tree optimization to fix calculation bug
* Optimize: Run calculations only when graph is open
* Prevent update function from stacking
#
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/CalfMoon/node-factor/compare/2.0.0...2.1.0
releases.name: v2.1.0

releases.author: CalfMoon
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fixed typos in settings by @visua1hue in https://github.com/CalfMoon/node-factor/pull/1
* Update graph when there is change in settings
* Fix looping error with travel forward tree
* Fixed node sizes being 0 when graph is initially opened
* Made README clearer

## New Contributors
* @visua1hue made their first contribution in https://github.com/CalfMoon/node-factor/pull/1

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/CalfMoon/node-factor/compare/1.0.0...2.0.0
releases.name: v2.0.0
